# brief [IMPLEMENTED]

## Status

Implemented — this is a real `hotam` CLI subcommand; running it does something.

## Canon

§Requirement

## Purpose

Usage: hotam brief <anchor-id> [--domain <path>] [--today YYYY-MM-DD] [--json]. Single-call aggregation of everything an agent needs to fully orient on one anchor (internal/query.Brief): the full card + one-hop neighborhood + freshness classification for Requirements, replacing the 3-4 separate round-trips (req show + req context + req related + due). Works for Requirement, Conflict, and Assumption anchors alike.
